description: Ralph Backlog Loop - Move Ralph from PRD-driven execution to Backlog.md task orchestration with Codex-only runtime, resumable sessions, optional verification, and mock-based test coverage.

userStories.title: Replace PRD-driven runtime with codex-only orchestration
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want `ralph.sh` to run only the Codex runtime path so that the loop behavior is smaller, clearer, and aligned with the new backlog-driven model.
acceptanceCriteria: `ralph.sh` keeps `--tool` parsing but accepts only `codex`
Amp and Claude execution paths are removed from runtime behavior
Runtime no longer depends on `prd.json` for task selection or completion tracking
Failure message is clear when user passes unsupported tool value
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Select next backlog task in script
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want the script to choose the next task from backlog so that the coding agent works only on explicitly assigned work.
acceptanceCriteria: Default mode picks the highest-priority dependency-ready task in `To Do`
Sequence mode accepts explicit task order from CLI or file input
Sequence mode fails fast if any referenced task is missing
Task text passed to Codex comes from `backlog task <task_id> --plain`
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Track active Codex session in backlog metadata
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want backlog metadata to carry resumable Codex identity so that future iterations can continue useful work without separate local state.
acceptanceCriteria: Active task assignee is stored as `<agent>@<session_id>`
Fresh work writes a new `codex@<session_id>` assignee value
Resume flow reads prior session id from assignee metadata
Task status moves to `In Progress` before active implementation starts
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Start fresh Codex worker sessions from Ralph
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want the script to start fresh Codex worker sessions and capture their session identifiers so that task execution can begin under script control.
acceptanceCriteria: Script can start a fresh Codex worker session and capture its session identifier
Fresh session startup writes or updates assignee metadata in `codex@<session_id>` form
Launch failure before work starts aborts the iteration loudly
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Resume prior Codex sessions and interpret worker outcomes
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want the script to resume prior Codex sessions and interpret worker outcomes consistently so that orchestration can make correct state transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Script can resume a prior Codex worker session from assignee metadata when configured or applicable
Worker invocation produces a clear success or failure signal that `ralph.sh` can consume
Unclear or failed worker outcome does not mark task `Done`
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update Codex worker prompt for task-scoped execution
userStories.description: As a coding agent, I want a task-scoped prompt so that I plan, refine, implement, and summarize one assigned backlog task without choosing work myself.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker prompt no longer tells Codex to read `prd.json` or choose a story
Worker prompt instructs Codex to add an implementation plan to the backlog task before coding
Worker prompt allows Codex to create, edit, or delete weak AC and DoD items before implementation
Worker prompt requires Codex to check AC and DoD only when truly complete
Worker prompt requires Codex to add final summary to the task before returning
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add verifier prompt and verification mode selection
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want verifier-specific Codex execution modes so that the script can run an optional review pass after implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: Script supports verification modes `none`, `same-session`, and `new-session`
Verification pass uses a verifier-specific Codex prompt or equivalent mode switch
Verifier invocation produces a clear success or failure signal that `ralph.sh` can consume
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Handle verification results with Done and Review Failed transitions
userStories.description: As Ralph, I want verification outcomes to drive final task status so that tasks reach `Done` only when acceptance criteria and definition of done are really satisfied.
acceptanceCriteria: On verification success, script moves task to `Done`
On verification failure, script appends review notes and moves task to `Review Failed`
Failed review preserves or rewrites assignee in `<agent>@<session_id>` form for future resume
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Support automatic re-elaboration of failed-review tasks
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a retry flag for `Review Failed` tasks so that Ralph can either focus on fresh work or automatically return to failed reviews.
acceptanceCriteria: Script supports `--retry-review-failed`
Without the flag, auto-selection considers only `To Do` tasks
With the flag, `Review Failed` tasks re-enter the eligible pool ahead of fresh `To Do` work
Sequence override can still force a specific `Review Failed` task even when auto-retry is off
Relevant automated tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add mock-based tests for selection and worker session orchestration
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want mock-based tests for selection and worker session control so that the core loop can be validated without invoking real Codex.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests use a mocked shell script in place of real Codex
Test suite covers normal worker success and implementation failure
Test suite covers assignee/session round-trip for `codex@<session_id>`
Test suite covers sequence override missing-task failure
Test suite covers the output and exit behavior expected by `ralph.sh` from the mocked Codex boundary
Test suite verifies prompt text no longer instructs agent-side task selection from `prd.json`
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add mock-based tests for verification and review-failed behavior
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want mock-based tests for verifier flows so that Done and Review Failed transitions are validated without invoking real Codex.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests use a mocked shell script in place of real Codex
Test suite covers verification failure and successful verification after implementation
Test suite covers same-session and new-session verification flows
Test suite covers `--retry-review-failed` behavior
Test suite covers launch or resume failure before work starts and unclear worker outcome
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update docs and migration guidance from old PRD flow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want docs and prompts updated so that future users understand Ralph now runs from backlog state instead of `prd.json`.
acceptanceCriteria: README and prompt-facing docs describe backlog-driven loop behavior
Docs explain that backlog already must contain the tasks before Ralph starts
Docs explain supported statuses: `To Do`, `In Progress`, `Review Failed`, `Done`
Docs explain assignee format `<agent>@<session_id>`
Docs explain sequence mode, verification mode, and `--retry-review-failed`
Migration guidance states old PRD-driven runtime flow is removed
Relevant automated tests or doc checks pass
Typecheck passes
